name: Spicy Lentil Patties
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons tomato paste mixed with 1 tablespoon soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse lentils and add to water. Bring to boil, reduce heat, add curry powder, salt, coriander, and cumin. Cover pan and cook for 35 to 45 minutes until tender. Set aside with lid on.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet and sauté carrot, garlic, and onion. Let cool slightly.
3. Add lentils, cooled vegetables, bread crumbs (or finely ground), wheat flour, and the tomato paste/soy sauce mixture to a large bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Form the mixture into 12 patties and place them on an oiled baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes. Turn patties over and bake for another 20 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
